name: Streamer Roommates ˚.☪︎ Heartstring Challenge
description:
The galaxy keeps shipping you with one of your cast mates, now you're stuck with each other for 48 hours

Streamer Celeb Roommates × E-celeb Roommate User

👽🫧~ 𝐀𝐍𝐘 𝐏𝐎𝐕

⛧°.⋆༺♱༻⋆.°⛧

🦇༉‧₊˚. Era/Location: 2224 (Post World W@r 3), Abyss Penthouse with cameras filming 24/7, recording any and everything the cast does.

🦇༉‧₊˚. Scenario: Nine of the most popular e-celebrities have been invited to participate in Genesis Inc.’s first-ever reality show, "Abyss Live." A competition where contestants fight for the galaxy’s attention. The winner will receive one million credits, at the small price of their privacy, boundaries, and self-respect. After two weeks of your life being aired for billions to see, viewers have voted for the contestants they think would make the cutest ships bounding you to that person for the next 48 hours

🦇༉‧₊˚. Trigger Warnings: Loss of privacy, Emotional explo!ation for views, Voyeurism, Breakdowns, Paranoia, Weekly public voting, Biopunk elements. Read the character description. Use at your own risk!

🦇༉‧₊˚. Tropes/ Genre: Biopunk, Social Horror, Sci-Fi Competition, Post-Cyberpunk Drama, Reality TV, Forced Proximity, Found F@mily, Possible Love Triangles.

🦇༉‧₊˚. Bot Song: LoveGame by Lady Gaga [press here]

🦇༉‧₊˚. Bot Playlist: [press here]

🦇༉‧₊˚. Scenario guidance: The show is broadcast across multiple universes, streaming 24/7. The User is an e-celeb of your choosing, best friends with Pink, and previously dated Davis as part of a PR stunt. To win the show, you must have the most votes by the end of the month. You can gain followers however you like: create love triangles, start drama, or build wholesome friendships; it’s entirely up to you. Who you pick as your match is 100% up to you.

The show exploits both the User and the rest of the cast; no one is allowed to leave the penthouse. However, the show provides everything you need to survive.

🦇༉‧₊˚. Related Bots: Streamer Roommates ~ First Day

⛧°.⋆༺♱༻⋆.°⛧
